wafv2.webacl.captchaconfig.CfnAbout: Specifies how AWS WAF should handle `CAPTCHA` evaluations. This is available at the web ACL level and in each rule.

wafv2.webacl.captchaconfig.ImmunityTimeP.Description: Determines how long a `CAPTCHA` token remains valid after the client successfully solves a `CAPTCHA` puzzle.
